log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Firbolg — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Firbolg — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Firbolg — Armored Tank.
→ Firbolg — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 20] FAIL! 42 necrotic damage. HP: 17/59
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Firbolg — Armored Tank --- HP: 17/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
--- Firbolg — Armored Tank --- HP: 6/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person

→ Firbolg — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
